completedPhaseClaimDetails.summary: Created classification-only BUG-025-003 packet for the residual knowledge health endpoint stress budget failure found during BUG-039 test phase. Existing BUG-025-001 and BUG-025-002 do not cover this /api/health latency residual. No production code, tests, generated config, BUG-039 artifacts, parent 025 artifacts, or certification-owned fields were changed.

Implemented and verified the BUG-025-003 health budget fix. /api/health now bounds auxiliary health work below the 2s stress budget, overlaps authenticated knowledge health refresh with auxiliary probe fan-out, and returns stale knowledge cache when refresh exceeds the bounded context. Repo-standard unit, check, lint, format-check, build, integration, e2e, full stress, and regression-quality guard commands passed. Full stress exited 0; TestKnowledge_HealthEndpointIncludesKnowledgeSection passed in 1.62s and BUG-039 recommendation stress remained green. Certification and fixed status remain validate-owned.

Independently verified BUG-025-003 current repo state. Regression-quality guard exited 0 with 0 violations and 0 warnings; Go unit exited 0 including internal/api health regressions; full stress exited 0 with TestKnowledge_HealthEndpointIncludesKnowledgeSection passing, parsed knowledge stats logged, and BUG-039 recommendation stress green; targeted knowledge health E2E passed after disposable test-stack cleanup. Existing skip markers remain in shared knowledge stress helper/other tests, but the BUG-025-003 health stress body executed and passed. Certification and fixed status remain validate-owned.

Verified protected BUG-025-003 regression scenarios and broader surfaces. Regression-quality guard exited 0 with 0 violations and 0 warnings; Go unit exited 0; Python unit exited 0 with 407 passed and 1 warning; integration exited 0; broader E2E exited 0 with shell 35/35 and health E2E green; full stress exited 0 with health stress 25/25, TestKnowledge_HealthEndpointIncludesKnowledgeSection passing, BUG-039 recommendation stress green, and stress packages passing; regression-baseline guard exited 0 with no route/endpoint collisions. No numeric coverage delta is claimed because the repo CLI exposes no sanctioned coverage command. Certification and fixed status remain validate-owned.

Reviewed BUG-025-003 health/knowledge changes for reuse, quality, and efficiency. Applied one narrow test-only cleanup by removing a dead callCount local and discard assignment from internal/api/health_test.go. Go unit, check, lint, format-check, and regression-quality guard passed after the cleanup. Certification and fixed status remain validate-owned.

Stabilization review found no remaining performance, infrastructure, configuration, build, reliability, or resource-usage blocker in the current BUG-025-003 state. Repo-standard Go unit, check, format-check, lint, build, integration, E2E, and full stress commands exited 0. Full stress reported health stress 25/25, TestKnowledge_HealthEndpointIncludesKnowledgeSection passing in 1.31s, and BUG-039 recommendation stress green with p95 936.265382ms. No code, tests, config, Docker lifecycle files, parent artifacts, or validate-owned certification fields were changed.

Reviewed BUG-025-003 health endpoint changes for auth behavior, sensitive health data, stale-cache behavior, timeout handling, logging, secrets, injection, and denial-of-service/resource risk. Current-session Go unit, check, format-check, lint, implementation-reality scan, and targeted security grep scans completed. No scoped security/privacy vulnerability was found; dependency CVE status is not claimed because no repo-standard dependency audit command is exposed by ./smackerel.sh or .specify/memory/agents.md. No certification or fixed status claimed.

blockers.summary: Policy deadlock confirmed by bubbles.validate on 2026-05-05T16:18:00Z: state-transition guard requires an audit phase before final certification, but validate must not record audit. Current state has no audit phase claim.

Current state-transition guard exits 1 with remaining blockers for two unchecked final DoD items, Scope 1 still In Progress, completedScopes empty, missing validate/audit phase records, and phase-scope coherence. Validate did not promote status to done.

Current ownership policy does not permit bubbles.validate to edit scopes.md, bug.md, or uservalidation.md directly, so validate did not mark Scope 1 Done, check final DoD items, mark the bug Fixed/Verified, or alter user validation checkboxes.
